name: Linken's Sphere
description: This magical sphere once protected one of the most famous heroes in history.

abilities.name: Spellblock
abilities.description: Blocks and completely negates most single-target abilities targeted at the wielder. Cooldown: 14. Mana Cost: 0.

abilities.name: Transfer Spellblock
abilities.description: Temporarily transfers the effects of Spellblock to the targeted allied hero. Cooldown: 14. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: 700. Duration: 14.
